overview: VOXY Longevity Center in Northwest Arkansas takes a personalized approach to aesthetics and wellness, blending advanced skincare, injectables, and longevity-focused care. Founded by PA-C Adrienne Easterling, the clinic delivers expert-led plans tailored to support long-term vitality and confidence.
highlights: Medical weight management and health coaching
targetAudience: Individuals seeking personalized aesthetic and wellness care with emphasis on energy, confidence, and longevity.
